commits.subject: Merge pull request #15 from devmade-ai/claude/code-review-audit-JlaCw
commits.body: Audit fixes: type safety, stale request guards, and hydration ordering
commits.title: Merge pull request #15 from devmade-ai/claude/code-review-audit-JlaCw

commits.subject: fix(audit): address code review findings across hooks, components, and lib
commits.body:
Race conditions:
- useStations: request ID guard discards stale responses from rapid filter changes
- usePersistedState: expose `loaded` flag, add mountedRef to prevent overwriting
  user selections during AsyncStorage hydration
- Home screen: defer first search until persisted preferences are loaded

Type safety:
- useStations: add isValidResult runtime check on RPC response rows
- station/[id]: typed FuelPriceRow interface replaces scattered `as` casts
- PriceEditor: typed CurrentPriceRow with defensive typeof checks

Memory safety:
- useLocation: mountedRef guards setState after unmount during GPS await
- FuelMapWeb: ref-based click handler prevents stale closure in map.on('click')

Cleanup:
- Remove unused `centered` and `loadingText` styles from home screen
- Remove stale `modal.tsx` reference from CLAUDE.md architecture
- Route console.error through debugAdd in supabase.ts and mapbox.ts
- Consolidate MAPBOX_TOKEN imports (FuelMapWeb, LocationSearch) to shared module
- PriceEditor wrapped in React.memo to avoid re-renders from parent form state

UI fixes:
- station/[id]: track coordinate validity via explicit flag instead of === 0 check
- station/[id]: fix trailing comma when city is empty

Tags: code-quality, type-safety, race-condition, cleanup, audit
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-audit
Semver: patch

commits.subject: fix(embed,a11y): audit fixes — URLs, duplication, accessibility, cleanup
commits.body:
Migrate repo-tor embed URLs from GitHub Pages to Vercel deployment,
deduplicate shared constants, fix accessibility gaps, and clean up
dead code identified during full codebase audit.

Changes:
- #1,#2,#16: Centralize EMBED_BASE, colors, and script URL into
  src/constants/embed.ts; update from GitHub Pages to Vercel
- #3: Remove unused return values (browser, setShowManualInstructions,
  supportsAutoInstall) from usePWAInstall; convert showManualInstructions
  from state to computed value since nothing mutates it
- #4,#5: Remove unused devDependencies (png-to-ico, sharp,
  @testing-library/react, @testing-library/user-event)
- #6,#8: Extract detectBrowser and isStandalone into src/utils/pwa.ts;
  import in usePWAInstall and DebugBanner instead of duplicating
- #7: Extract validatePayload and EMAIL_PATTERN into src/utils/validation.ts;
  tests now import and exercise the real functions
- #9: Add Escape key handler and focus trap to InstallInstructionsModal
- #10: Replace array index key with content-based key in About.tsx
- #11: Change diagnostic probe from POST with body to HEAD (no side effects)
- #12: Add sandbox="allow-scripts" to chart iframes
- #13: Add onerror handler to embed.js script element
- #14: Rename package.json name from vite-scaffold to see-veo

Tags: embed, accessibility, cleanup, refactor, security, testing

commits.body:
data.json (2.68 MB) exceeded workbox's default 2 MiB precache limit,
causing the Vercel build to fail. Moved from globPatterns (precache) to
runtime caching with NetworkFirst strategy — users get fresh data when
online, cached data when offline.

commits.subject: fix: resolve dashboard JSON loading error on Vercel deployment
commits.body:
The Vercel SPA rewrite rule was rewriting data.json requests to
index.html, causing the dashboard to receive HTML instead of JSON.
Additionally, data.json was not in dashboard/public/ so Vite never
included it in the build output.

- Fix vercel.json rewrite to exclude files with extensions from SPA fallback
- Move data.json to dashboard/public/ so Vite includes it in dist/
- Update aggregate-processed.js default output to dashboard/public/
- Add content-type guard and user-friendly error messages in App.jsx
- Update documentation path references

commits.body:
Remove the persisted startingBalance concept from Workspace and replace
it with a lightweight, non-stored "Cash on hand" input on the Forecast
tab. Users enter how much cash they have and instantly see how long it
lasts based on the forecast — without persisting the value.

Removed:
- Cashflow tab (CashflowTab.vue, router, tab nav)
- Cashflow engine (engine/cashflow.ts + tests)
- Envelope engine (engine/envelope.ts + tests)
- startingBalance from Workspace type, form, demo data
- Envelope summary from CompareTab

Added:
- Cash on hand input on ProjectedTab with month-by-month runway calc
- Shows "Runs out in [month]", "Cash is growing", or "Lasts all N months"

Updated:
- Export/import strips legacy startingBalance/totalBudget on import
- All docs (USER_GUIDE, TESTING_GUIDE, README, HISTORY, SESSION_NOTES)

commits.subject: chore: migrate deployment from GitHub Pages to Vercel
commits.body:
GitHub Pages requires a 404.html hack for SPA routing, has no env var
injection at build, and needs manual "source" setting in repo UI.
Vercel handles all of this natively.

- Add vercel.json with SPA rewrite rule for client-side routing
- Delete .github/workflows/deploy.yml (GitHub Actions no longer needed)
- Change vite.config.js base from './' to '/' (Vercel serves at root)
- Update all live URL references to repo-tor.vercel.app
- Update ADMIN_GUIDE deployment section with Vercel setup instructions

Tags: infrastructure, deployment

commits.subject: fix(ui,tones): move debug pill to left side and fix tone storage
commits.body:
Debug pill at top-right covered header action buttons (settings, refresh).
Moved to top-left to avoid overlap while still avoiding compose bar.

Custom tones added via ToneEditModal were never persisted to local storage
because addRecentTones() was only called in sendMessage(), but messages are
always sent without tones — tones are added post-send via editMessageTones()
which lacked the call.

Added debugLog() calls to recentTones service so tone storage operations
are visible in the debug pill's App tab for easier debugging.

commits.subject: feat(pwa,docs): add install instructions modal, diagnostic timeout, session notes
commits.body:
Adopt remaining patterns from external glow-props CLAUDE.md:

1. InstallInstructionsModal: Browser-specific step-by-step PWA install
   guides in a proper modal component, replacing window.alert() calls
   in home.tsx. Covers Safari iOS/macOS, Firefox Android/Desktop,
   Chrome Android/iOS/Desktop with contextual messaging.

2. 5-second diagnostic timeout in usePWAInstall: On Chromium browsers,
   if beforeinstallprompt hasn't fired after 5s, logs manifest link
   and SW controller status to help debug installability issues.

3. docs/SESSION_NOTES.md: Compact context snapshot template rewritten
   at each session end for quick handoff between AI sessions.

4. Updated CLAUDE.md: Added SESSION_NOTES.md to core docs table and
   session workflow, added new components to project structure.

commits.subject: fix(pwa,tones): fix duplicate update banner and tone modal input focus
commits.body:
Two bug fixes:

1. PWA "Update Available" banner appeared multiple times because
   updatefound/statechange event listeners were never cleaned up on
   unmount and had no guard against re-triggering. Added
   updateDetectedRef to show banner only once per lifecycle, and
   proper removeEventListener cleanup in the useEffect return.

2. ToneEditModal custom tone TextInput closed the modal on web.
   The TouchableOpacity + onStartShouldSetResponder pattern doesn't
   reliably prevent event propagation on web. Switched to the
   Pressable + e.stopPropagation() pattern already used by
   ReactionPicker.

Tags: pwa, bugfix, tones, modal, web
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ux-polish
Semver: patch

commits.subject: feat(tones): replace predefined tones with custom tone tags
commits.body:
Users can now type any single word as a tone tag instead of picking from
a fixed list of 25. Six defaults (happy, sad, serious, joking, sarcastic,
sincere) are provided for quick picking. Recent custom tones are stored
locally for re-use. Colors are assigned deterministically from a palette
based on label hash.

Removed server-side tone usage tracking (tone_usage table,
increment_tone_usage function, global_tone_popularity view) and the
deprecated message_replies table. Tone categories and descriptions
removed in favor of a flat, simple selector with custom input.

commits.subject: fix(export): fix Download Current race condition with React re-render
commits.body:
updateExporting(true) triggers a React re-render that overwrites the
manual transform: scale(1) set on the canvas back to scale(previewScale).
By setting the transform AFTER the re-render settles (100ms wait), the
manual override persists through the toPng capture — matching the same
proven pattern used by handleExportMultiple.

Tags: export, bug-fix, timing
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: export
Semver: patch

commits.body:
The detached <a> element with link.click() fails to trigger downloads in
Safari, PWA contexts, and with large data URLs from print-size exports.
Replaced with fetch-to-blob + file-saver's saveAs, matching the reliable
pattern already used by multi-page and multi-platform ZIP exports.
